pr.title: Record: SLOT-32 + Partial Depth Recurrence — val_bpb 0.7736 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Combines SLOT-32 scoring with partial depth recurrence (repeat layers 4/5 + iter conditioning) on XSA-11 to squeeze more tokens.
techniques: 32-step SLOT tuning with higher LR and cosine->0.001 decay
Partial depth recurrence on layers 4/5 with iter_embed/iter_gate conditioning
Late QAT+int6 compression with EMA/SWA weight averaging
